dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.utils

Class AsList<T,GUI extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>

  • java.lang.Object
    • dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.utils.AsList<T,GUI,S>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - The type of the list.
    GUI - The type of the gui.

    public abstract class AsList<T,GUI extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>
extends Object
    This class is used to make a single gui item into many. Example: Show all online players.

    Since:
    1.5.0

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  AsList.Holder<GUI extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage> 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AsList() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      List<AsList.Holder<GUI,S>> call(org.bukkit.entity.Player p, S localStorage)
      This is an internal method, don't use it.
      abstract void clickAction(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, Item.WrappedInventoryClickEvent<GUI,S> wrappedEvent, T value)
      The action to run when the item is clicked
      abstract List<T> getList(org.bukkit.entity.Player p, S localStorage)
      Get the list of values
      abstract Replacer<S> handle(T value, org.bukkit.entity.Player p)
      Get calls for every value in the list If the T is a player, that player will be used in getList(Player, IStorage) and Replacer.replace(Player, IStorage)
      boolean show(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, S localStorage, T value)
      Check if the item should be shown.

      • AsList

        public AsList()

    • Method Detail

      • call

        public List<AsList.Holder<GUI,S>> call(org.bukkit.entity.Player p,
                                       S localStorage)
        This is an internal method, don't use it.

        Parameters:
        p - The player to call the method on
        localStorage - The local storage
        Returns:
        The list with the method called on each value
        Since:
        1.5.0

      • handle

        public abstract Replacer<S> handle(T value,
                                   org.bukkit.entity.Player p)
        Get calls for every value in the list If the T is a player, that player will be used in getList(Player, IStorage) and Replacer.replace(Player, IStorage)

        Parameters:
        value - The value to get the calls for
        p - The player to get the calls for
        Returns:
        The replacer for the value
        Since:
        1.5.0

      • getList

        public abstract List<T> getList(org.bukkit.entity.Player p,
                                S localStorage)
        Get the list of values

        Parameters:
        p - The player to get the list for
        localStorage - The local storage
        Returns:
        The list of values
        Since:
        1.5.1

      • clickAction

        public abstract void clickAction(org.bukkit.entity.Player player,
                                 Item.WrappedInventoryClickEvent<GUI,S> wrappedEvent,
                                 T value)
        The action to run when the item is clicked

        Parameters:
        player - The player that clicked the item
        wrappedEvent - The wrapped event
        value - The value of the asList
        Since:
        1.12.0

      • show

        public boolean show(org.bukkit.entity.Player player,
                    S localStorage,
                    T value)
        Check if the item should be shown.

        Parameters:
        player - The player to check for
        localStorage - The local storage
        value - The value to check for
        Returns:
        If the item should be shown
        Since:
        1.19.0
